commit.message:
Rewrite widget-grid with key-based remount for reliable drops

Root cause: RGL only reads layouts prop on mount. New children added
after mount get default tiny dimensions regardless of the layouts prop.

Fix: when widgets change (add/remove), force RGL to fully remount via
a key change. onLayoutChange only persists to localStorage — no state
updates, no re-renders, no infinite loops possible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix sticky: poll and re-apply while mpv runs instead of applying twice

XFCE unpredictably clears _NET_WM_STATE_STICKY whenever mpv remaps its
window (e.g. on video load, resize). Timing two applications is fragile.

Instead, _apply_sticky now runs a 1-second polling loop for the entire
mpv session: check the window state with xprop and re-apply with wmctrl
whenever XFCE has cleared it. Exits cleanly when the IPC socket goes away.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: audit protocol — 7 bugs causing false positives

Root cause: WebFetch converts HTML to markdown, losing <head> content
(meta tags, canonical, JSON-LD, alt attributes). Agent reported
"missing" items it never actually checked.

Fixed:
- audit.md: 4-phase protocol (collect → check → score → self-check)
  - Phase 1: explicit tool selection (Scrapling raw HTML > WebFetch)
  - Phase 2: robots.txt fetched separately, sitemap path from robots.txt
  - Phase 3: security headers marked [NOT VERIFIED] when no curl access
  - Phase 4: hard gate self-check before delivering report
- SKILL.md: tool selection table, "WebFetch Trap" warning, enforced
  validation protocol with data source citations
- schema-generator.md: raw HTML required for JSON-LD extraction
- data-sources.md: honest tool capability matrix (what each CAN/CANNOT do)

Also added: agent definition, full skill set (7 files), updated README.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Custom student performance dataset (not sklearn canned)
- Conceptual-first, code-second pattern throughout
- Manual CV implementation before sklearn shortcut
- Polynomial regression + tree depth complexity examples
- Stratified CV explanation
- Complete evaluation protocol walkthrough

New diagrams: evaluation_pipeline, underfit_overfit_curve, kfold_cv,
polynomial_fit_examples, split_variance, stratified_cv

commit.message:
Initial commit — HoloLaser 3D Volumetric Projection Simulator

Full-stack web app for computing 2D laser masks using inverse Radon
transform (filtered back-projection) for volumetric holographic display.

Features:
- STL upload and built-in shape generation (sphere, cube, torus)
- Voxelization via ray-casting with parity-rule fill
- Forward Radon transform and FBP reconstruction with Ram-Lak filter
- Interactive 3D visualization with Three.js (laser cones, voxel clouds, masks)
- Display mode toggle (target/reconstructed/both) with error metrics
- Web Worker for off-thread computation
- Accessible UI with ARIA labels, skip navigation, keyboard support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
add استرداد/Reward to offer badge keywords and reduce Arabic table header text size

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix widget-grid infinite loop permanently using ref-based layouts

Layouts now live in a useRef instead of useState. onLayoutChange updates
the ref and persists to localStorage but NEVER triggers a React re-render.
This makes it structurally impossible for the feedback loop to occur:
RGL fires onLayoutChange → ref updates (no re-render) → loop cannot start.

Widget list changes (add/remove) update the ref synchronously during render
via a key comparison, triggering exactly one re-render.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fuse gate+up GEMV into single dispatch with split writer kernel

Reduces FFN chain from 6 to 5 programs per layer by combining gate and up
projections into a single GEMV that writes to two separate output buffers
via a split writer kernel. Saves one program boundary + one activation
read per layer × 32 layers (~1ms/tok improvement).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Turn 2 ignoring valid search results + wrong command for content search

Root cause: find -iname searches FILENAMES not file contents. For "file
containing word X", grep -ril is correct. find -iname is for "file named X".

Changes:
- sys1: add grep example for Downloads to anchor "contains word X" → grep
  (previously only Desktop+Documents had grep examples; Downloads was missing,
  so LLM matched Downloads queries to find -iname instead)
- reformatOutput: add handlers for plain find (filename results) and grep -r
  (content results) — both add a labeled header so Turn 2 knows what the
  data represents instead of seeing raw unlabelled filenames
- sys2: rewrite from hedging ("if data doesn't answer, say I don't have it")
  to directive ("report what the data shows") — stops LLM from asking
  clarifying questions when it receives unlabelled output
- usr2: reinstate command context "Command output (from `cmd`):" so Turn 2
  always knows what command produced the data
- Side effect: header line bumps allLines count from 4→5, so clipboard
  copy now fires correctly for 4-result searches

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Return errors as SSE so Datastar can display them

When run_generate_node hit early errors (auth, node not found), it
returned text/plain which Datastar silently ignores. Wrap the handler
so all error paths return SSE signal patches with _status set to the
error message. Also make the status text visible after errors, not
only during generation.

commit.message:
Bisection drawdown : capital épuisé exactement à ageFin

Le drawdown était calculé par formule d'annuité avec un taux blend fixe,
mais la simulation applique des rendements distincts par enveloppe avec
des drags fiscaux différents. Résultat : dérive cumulative (ex: 426k€
de résidu à 80 ans au lieu de 0).

Fix : simulateDrawdownFinal() réplique la logique capital des phases 2-3
(croissance par enveloppe, retrait pro-rata, IS drag, PER débloqué à 64).
Bisection (50 itérations max, convergence à 1€) sur cette simulation
pour trouver le drawdown exact. La formule d'annuité reste comme borne
haute initiale.

commit.message:
perf: render SVG overlay at half resolution to speed up feMorphology

feMorphology is O(pixels) — at 25MP it takes ~55s. Render the SVG at
1/2 size using viewBox scaling, then upscale with Lanczos before
compositing. This makes it ~4× faster (~14s at 25MP) while preserving
the transparency and outline appearance unchanged.

Reverts the double-stroke workaround from the previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(web): fix auth redirect loop after login

Two issues fixed:
1. Renamed proxy.ts → lib/auth-middleware-draft.ts to prevent it from
   being compiled as Next.js middleware. It was causing 307 redirects
   from /dashboard to /auth?redirect= because the cookie check always
   fails (cookies are on the API domain, not the web domain).

2. Dashboard layout had a zustand persist hydration race condition:
   isAuthenticated defaults to false before localStorage rehydration,
   causing immediate redirect to /auth. Added hydration gate to wait
   for persist rehydration before checking auth state.

commit.message:
Watchdog for passive scanning + code cleanup

- Add passive advertisement watchdog: always run poll timer even in
  passive mode; skip BLE connect when ads are fresh (<2 poll intervals),
  but re-register callback and connect when ads have been silent too long
- Reset watchdog timer on successful poll so active connections also
  count as "heard from the lock"
- Extract get_ble_device() helper to eliminate duplicated BLE device
  fallback pattern across lock.py, switch.py, and __init__.py
- Move entry.runtime_data assignment before first_refresh so coordinator
  can access last_ble_device on all refresh calls
- Extract _PASSIVE_WATCHDOG_THRESHOLD constant; cache datetime.now()
  in _poll_state to avoid timestamp drift
